Description: STING DWG→MEP run rules. Moves the run engine's hardcoded policy into data: per-kind default size + run elevation + riser default size, the wall-mount category set, the fitting coincidence tolerance, and the drainage fall bands. Corporate baseline; projects override at <project>/_BIM_COORD/dwg_run_rules.json (per-field; project wins) — same loader pattern as STING_DWG_FIXTURE_MAP.json. The shipped values reproduce the previous hardcoded defaults EXACTLY, so an un-customised project converts byte-for-byte unchanged. ServiceRules is an OVERRIDE surface only: when empty the corporate service→MEPSystemClassification mapping in MepServiceClassifier (proven, in code) is used; project entries add/override it. DrainageSlopeBands ships a single flat 1.25% (1:80) band = the previous behaviour; projects wanting BS EN 12056 graduated falls (e.g. DN≤50 → 2.5% / 1:40, DN≤75 → 1:60, DN≤100 → 1:80, larger → 1:100) add bands here. RiserDefaultSize is consumed by the riser builder (a stack is larger than a branch default).
